title: Polish intent admission copy
problem: The examples/intents/greenfield/clear-promoted.draft.json intent admission copy needs clearer operator-facing wording while preserving deterministic admission behavior.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The greenfield fixture contains complete intent fields, measurable acceptance criteria, and a bounded capability envelope without changing admission behavior.
The draft promotes through deterministic intent admission with ambiguity at or below 0.20.

constraints: Keep authority limited to examples/intents/greenfield fixture files.
Do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if deterministic admission reports ambiguity above 0.20.
Stop if policy flags authority outside examples/intents/greenfield.

toolPermissions.reason: Verify the deterministic intent admission fixture path.
